text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 87 

GAP_DAYS_OONP_1M 

LABEL: Gap Out-of-Network Pharmacy — Number of Days in One-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a one-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an 
out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This
